summary: Tested Trading Mode features (Paper/Live toggle). All 11 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified: PAPER/LIVE badge in header, Paper Trading indicator in Watchlist, Trading Mode section with toggle in Settings. Fixed infinite loop bug in BrokerAllocationsSection.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: BrokerAllocationsSection had infinite loop bug (Maximum update depth exceeded) caused by useEffect depending on `tickers` array which creates new reference on each render. Fixed by using a memoized string key for comparison.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trading Mode features (Paper/Live) fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/settings (simulate_24_7, trading_mode), GET /api/health (trading_mode, brokers_connected), GET /api/brokers/status, POST /api/brokers/reconnect, WebSocket INITIAL_STATE (simulate_24_7). Frontend components: Header PAPER badge, WatchlistTab Paper Trading indicator, SettingsTab TradingModeSection with toggle. BrokerAllocationsSection useEffect fixed to prevent infinite loop.

POST /api/settings.toggle_simulate_24_7: Persists to MongoDB and reflects in GET /api/settings and GET /api/health

POST /api/brokers/reconnect.returns: Results object with broker connection attempts

POST /api/brokers/{broker_id}/test.tested: alpaca with fake credentials - correctly fails at live_connection step

header_trading_mode_badge.shows: PAPER when simulate_24_7=true, LIVE when false

ticker_card_broker_chips.supports_failed_broker_animation: Yes - uses failedBrokers state from store

bugs_fixed_during_testing.cause: useEffect had `tickers` array as dependency which creates new reference on each render
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Created memoized tickerBrokerKey string to use as dependency instead of raw tickers array
